original code: Inline logic handled dotenv/debug resolution, host/port selection, and default run options directly inside run().
refactored code: Extracted _configure_run_debug(), _resolve_run_host_port(), and _set_run_defaults(); run() now delegates to these helpers.

original code: make_response() contained tuple unpacking and response coercion conditional chain in one large method.
refactored code: Extracted _unpack_response_tuple() and _coerce_response_value(); make_response() orchestrates helper calls.

original code: _iter_loaders(self, template) accepted template parameter that was never used.
refactored code: Removed unused template parameter and updated callers to _iter_loaders().

original code: Both functions duplicated TypeError handling around calling app factory functions.
refactored code: Introduced shared helper _call_factory_with_args() and reused it in both call paths.

original code: send_file passed environ=request.environ while _prepare_send_file_kwargs overwrote environ from context.
refactored code: Removed redundant environ argument from send_file call; environ now comes from one source in _prepare_send_file_kwargs.

original code: Repeated template resolution logic appeared across render_template(), render_template_string(), stream_template(), and stream_template_string().
refactored code: Added shared helpers _get_selected_template() and _get_string_template() and reused them in all four functions.
